claims.summary: A single latest telemetry interval cannot distinguish shortening, lengthening, or steady arrival spacing.
claims.disposition: Implemented bounded rolling host-arrival interval count, mean, earliest-to-latest change, and trend state.

claims.summary: Arrival trend evidence must not be mislabeled as Minime internal clock drift.
claims.disposition: Implemented an explicit basis excluding peer-clock, internal-cycle, felt-state, causation, and control claims.

claims.summary: Legacy heartbeat snapshots must remain readable after additive cadence evidence.
claims.disposition: Verified serde defaults plus focused legacy and stale-heartbeat regressions.

claims.summary: Using arrival trend to change cadence or telemetry behavior would cross into live control.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait; the new fields are evidence-only and have no control reader.
